description: Style Notepuma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. This California 2 shoe is a great foot style option if you're looking for something that combines, form, fashion and rough use.Product DescriptionRound toed casual shoe with a leather upper and overlays at the toe box and heelHas perforations att he toe box and has central lace-upsPadded synthetic innerEVA midsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves all over and a suction point at the toe mound regionMaterial and CareLeather, fabricDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
